channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Riley Gaines takes swipe at Harris after VP releases surprise video to supporters
item.description: Former NCAA swimmer and OutKick contributor Riley Gaines got in on the viral trend of making fun of Vice President Kamala Harris over a surprising video to supporters.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Giants' Malik Nabers has 'no regrets' over critical remarks about team
item.description: New York Giants rookie wide receiver Malik Nabers has "no regrets" over the remarks he made about his team on Sunday but said he would change some of his wording after watching film.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears CB Jaylon Johnson not interested in bright spots with team's skid at 5 games going into Thanksgiving
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — Jaylon Johnson wasn't all that interested in discussing any bright spots or reasons to have hope for the Bears. The star cornerback made his feelings clear.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Daniel Jones is signing with the Vikings after his release from the Giants, AP source says
item.description: A person familiar with the decision says former New York Giants quarterback Daniel Jones is signing with the Minnesota Vikings.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Daniel Jones to sign with Vikings after tumultuous end with Giants: report
item.description: Free-agent quarterback Daniel Jones is reportedly set to sign with the Minnesota Vikings following his tumultuous end with the New York Giants.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pep Guardiola clarifies his remark about self harm made after Man City's latest bad result
item.description: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has moved to clarify a light-hearted remark he made about wanting to harm himself following his team’s match in the Champions League.
item.dc:creator: Steve Douglas, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Derrick Henry and Saquon Barkley prepare for earliest matchup ever between 1,300-yard running backs
item.description: Saquon Barkley and Derrick Henry combined for 395 yards rushing on back-to-back nights at SoFi Stadium as the dynamic playmakers keep proving that investing in running backs can pay off in the right situation.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Broome has 23 points and 19 rebounds as No. 4 Auburn tops No. 12 UNC 85-72 to reach Maui title game
item.description: LAHAINA, Hawaii (AP) — Johni Broome had 23 points and a career-best 19 rebounds to lead No. 4 Auburn to an 85-72 victory over No. 12 North Carolina in a Maui Invitational semifinal Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 2 UConn falls again in Maui, losing 73-72 to Colorado on Jakimovski's off-balance layup
item.description: LAHAINA, Hawaii (AP) — Andrej Jakimovski converted an off-balance layup with 8 seconds left, and Colorado handed No. 2 UConn its second loss in two days at the Maui Invitational, beating the two-time defending national champion 73-72 on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kansas center Hunter Dickinson ejected for kicking Duke's Maliq Brown in the head
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Kansas center Hunter Dickinson was ejected midway through the second half of the top-ranked Jayhawks' 75-72 victory over No. 11 Duke on Tuesday night for kicking the Blue Devils' Maliq Brown in the head.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers, Blake Snell agree to $182 million deal for MLB offseason's first big splash: reports
item.description: After a tumultuous free agency last year, Blake Snell has reportedly signed a massive deal with the Los Angeles Dodgers, who continue their wild spending.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Blake Snell and Dodgers agree to $182 million, 5-year contract, AP source says
item.description: Blake Snell has agreed to a $182 million, five-year contract with the World Series champion Los Angeles Dodgers, according to a person with direct knowledge of the negotiations.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bucks hold Antetokounmpo out of NBA Cup game at Miami with swelling in left knee
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Giannis Antetokounmpo, the league's leading scorer this season, was unexpectedly held out of the Milwaukee Bucks' NBA Cup game at the Miami Heat on Tuesday night with swelling in his left knee. He had been expected to play until about an hour before the game.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: North Carolina parting ways with Hall of Fame football coach Mack Brown
item.description: One day after longtime college football coach Mack Brown revealed his intention to return to North Carolina in 2025, the school announced his dismissal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets management turns sights to 2025
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The Jets are a 3 and 8 football team, getting set to host the Seahawks on Sunday. Gone is the head coach. Gone is the general manager. Owner Woody Johnson is running wild.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: North Carolina football coach Mack Brown won't return for 2025 season
item.description: Mack Brown sounded firm in his intent to return for another season as North Carolina's coach. A day later, the school announced it was time for a change instead.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rays will play 19 of their first 22 games at home as MLB switches series to avoid summer rain
item.description: Major League Baseball switched a pair of series involving the Tampa Bay Rays to the first two months of the season in an attempt to avoid summer rain at open-air Steinbrenner Field, their temporary home following damage to Tropicana Field.
item.dc:creator: AP, WFLA, NBC

item.title: NBA says Hawks violated player participation policy by sitting Trae Young for Cup game
item.description: The NBA fined the Atlanta Hawks $100,000 on Tuesday after an investigation determined that guard Trae Young could have played in an NBA Cup game against the Boston Celtics on Nov. 12. The Hawks listed Young on their injury report that night as out because of tendinitis in his right Achilles.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: County asks Tampa Bay Rays to commit to plans for $1.3 billion ballpark by Sunday
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — The Tampa Bay Rays should declare in writing whether they want to pursue an existing financing plan for a new $1.3 billion ballpark or walk away from the deal, a top county official says.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lionel Messi has his new coach: Javier Mascherano's hiring by Inter Miami is now complete
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Lionel Messi and Javier Mascherano are together again, this time with Inter Miami. The former Barcelona and Argentina teammates have reunited, with Inter Miami announcing Tuesday that Mascherano's hiring as the club's new coach is complete.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Traffic citations against Dolphins' Tyreek Hill dismissed after officers no-show at hearing
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Traffic citations issued to Miami Dolphins star wide receiver Tyreek Hill after a September altercation with police have been dismissed after the charging officers didn’t attend a court hearing.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 10 Chicagoland prep football programs will play for an IHSA state championship in Normal this week
item.description: Ten Chicagoland prep football programs will play for an Illinois High School Association state championship later this week in Normal. That includes two based in the city and two that will play each other for the state title in Class 8A, the IHSA's largest division.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: No. 1 UCLA among many top women's teams headed to warm locations for Thanksgiving tournaments
item.description: UCLA, along with many other of the top teams, are heading to Thanksgiving tournaments in warm locations this week. The newly crowned No. 1 Bruins are headed to Hawaii for the Rainbow Wahine Tournament where they'll face UT Martin, Fresno State and Hawaii over three days.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hagel ties NHL record with 4 assists in 1st period, Lightning beat Avalanche 8-2
item.description: Brandon Hagel tied an NHL record with four assists in the opening period and finished with five as the Tampa Bay Lightning cruised past the Colorado Avalanche 8-2 on Monday.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Giants looked terrible after emotionally draining week
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- There is no other way to cut it. The Giants' performance yesterday was putrid. They got embarrassed by the Bucs 30-7. Tommy DeVito got mocked by Tampa quarterback Baker Mayfield. Boo's rained down at MetLife Stadium. Effort was not there.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Bucs with Bowles looks back at dominating win over the Giants
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers returned from their bye week in dominating fashion with a 30-7 win over the New York Giants that ended a four-game losing streak and helped their playoff hopes in the process.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New stadium, new look: Salt Lake Bees unveil 2025 logos, uniforms
item.description: It's a whole new era for the Salt Lake Bees as they prepare for their move to South Jordan where they will play in their brand new home of Daybreak Field.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Special teams miscues prove costly for Bears in overtime loss to Vikings
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Cairo Santos had a field goal blocked — again. DeAndre Carter muffed a punt in the second half. And those were just the special teams mistakes for the struggling Chicago Bears.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jets look for coach, GM amid chaos
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – With the Jets’ season completely off the rails, it wasn't a big surprise when General Manager Joe Douglas was fired this week. Changes need to be made, and Douglas was carrying around a 30-64 record over five-plus seasons.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: GJ Tigers Football season recap
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—"It's hard to end an era with this senior class because they’re a special group of kids," said Head Coach Landon McKee. "They changed this program, and they get the credit for that.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Local fighter wins WBC Muy Thai world title
item.description: Selina Flores, 26, recently won the WBC Muy Thai world title, making history as the third American woman to ever do so.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Corner Canyon wins back-to-back 6A championships
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Corner Canyon dynasty continues. The Chargers won their second straight 6A state championship, and fourth in the last six years, with a hard-fought 30-27 win over Lone Peak, avenging their lone loss in the regular season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
